const url = ($('SalesIQ - Intro').first()?.json?.body?.visitor?.current_page_url || '').toString();
const m = url.match(/\/([a-z]{2})-([a-z]{2})\//i);
const detected = m ? m[1].toLowerCase() : 'en';
const locale = phrases[detected] ? detected : 'en';
const pool = phrases[locale];

const waintingTime = pool[Math.floor(Math.random() * pool.length)];

return [{ waintingTime }];

nodes.name: Post system message - Operators are busy

value.message: Your last message is too long, make it shorter.

parameters.query:
UPDATE visitors_settings
SET va_state = jsonb_set(
      COALESCE(va_state, '{}'::jsonb),
      '{last_opener}',
      jsonb_build_object('text', $1::text, 'sent_at', NOW())
    ),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE session_id = $2
RETURNING id;

assignments.value: ={{ [{"text":"Sorry, I am unable to provide assistance at the moment."}, {"text":`Please try starting a new chat or reach out to us using the contact details from the [Contact Us](${$('Get settings').last().json.contactUs_url}) page.`}] }}

parameters.text: Describe this image in detail. If it shows a travel document (boarding pass, e-ticket, passport, ID, booking confirmation, receipt) or a screenshot of an app, website, or error message, transcribe any visible text (names, booking codes, dates, prices, error messages, fields). Otherwise describe what is visible in the image.

text

nodes.name: Save event to Click-House Chat Started

parameters.query:
WITH opener AS (
  SELECT
    va_state->'last_opener'->>'text' AS text,
    COALESCE(
      (va_state->'last_opener'->>'sent_at')::timestamptz,
      NOW()
    ) AS sent_at
  FROM visitors_settings
  WHERE session_id = $1
    AND va_state ? 'last_opener'
    AND va_state->'last_opener' IS NOT NULL
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO chat_messages (session_id, message, created_at)
  SELECT
    $1,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'type', 'ai',
      'content', text,
      'additional_kwargs', '{}'::jsonb,
      'response_metadata', '{}'::jsonb,
      'tool_calls', '[]'::jsonb,
      'invalid_tool_calls', '[]'::jsonb
    ),
    sent_at
  FROM opener
  RETURNING id
),
cleared AS (
  UPDATE visitors_settings
  SET va_state = va_state - 'last_opener'
  WHERE session_id = $1
    AND va_state ? 'last_opener'
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inserted), 0) AS opener_inserted,
  COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cleared), 0) AS opener_cleared;
